title: Mugget's Explosive Scavenger
description: The creepers have evolved, become more.... "human". And yet they still go boom when you get too close. Talk about social awkwardness.
body:
This resource pack changes the creeper into an "Explosive Scavenger". The remodelled and retextured creeper/scavenger has a completely reanimated [walk cycle](https://postimg.cc/nMZzwDYL).
![walk cycle](https://i.postimg.cc/L4g15kJj/creeper.gif)
